properties.name: Ammunition
properties.description: Requires ammunition to fire. Roll your ammunition die each time you attack; on a 1 or 2 the die size drops. If used in melee, it's an improvised weapon.

properties.name: Blocking
properties.description: While equipped, your AC increases by +1. The bonus applies once and does not stack.

properties.name: Critical
properties.description: Gains +1 to your Critical Threat range per rank of Critical when attacking with it (max +3). Does not stack when dual-wielding.

properties.name: Deadly
properties.description: On a critical hit, adds +1 damage die per rank of Deadly, once per turn (max rank 3).

properties.name: Disarm
properties.description: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to disarm a target creature.

properties.name: Evocation
properties.description: Combat Scroll only. Seals an echo of a Ninjutsu, Genjutsu, or weapon you know into the scroll. Attacks use that source's attack bonus and damage type, no ability-mod to damage, at most 1 attack per Attack action. Damage die scales at levels 5/11/17.

properties.name: Finesse
properties.description: You may use either your Strength or Dexterity modifier for attack and damage rolls (must use the same for both).

properties.name: Flexible
properties.description: Lists a secondary damage type in parentheses (e.g. Flexible (Bludgeoning)). You choose the damage type when rolling damage, but the damage die is one step smaller (min d4).

properties.name: Grapple
properties.description: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to grapple a target creature.

properties.name: Heavy
properties.description: Requires Strength 16 or higher to wield without disadvantage. Creatures add half their Strength modifier to damage rolls with it.

properties.name: Hidden
properties.description: Advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks to conceal the weapon.

properties.name: Lethal
properties.description: Adds +1 damage die against a surprised creature or one that can't see you, per rank of Lethal, once per turn. Stacks up to rank 5.

properties.name: Light
properties.description: Small and easy to handle. Once per turn, while dual-wielding two light weapons, you can make a second attack with the off-hand weapon as part of the Attack action.

properties.name: Loading
properties.description: A limited number of shots between reloads. Reloading uses the Use an Object action and requires a free hand.

properties.name: Multiattack
properties.description: May be used to attack again as a bonus action. You can't add your ability modifier or any damage bonuses to the bonus-action damage — only the weapon's base die.

properties.name: Range
properties.description: Ranged weapon. Two numbers in parentheses: normal range in feet / maximum range. Beyond normal range: disadvantage on the attack. Beyond long range: cannot attack.

properties.name: Reach
properties.description: Adds 5 feet to your reach per rank of Reach when attacking with it (e.g. Reach 1 = +5 ft).

properties.name: Returning
properties.description: After a thrown ranged attack within 30 ft, you may recall the weapon to your hand. Requires one free hand to catch.

properties.name: Thrown
properties.description: You can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack using Strength (not Dexterity) for attack and damage rolls.

properties.name: Tactical
properties.description: Once per turn, deals +1 damage per rank of any physical condition on the target (e.g. Bruised 3 + Bleed 2 → +5 damage).

properties.name: Trip
properties.description: In place of one weapon attack, attempt to Trip or Shove a target. On success, deals the weapon's damage.

properties.name: Two-Handed
properties.description: Requires two hands to use.

properties.name: Unarmed
properties.description: Equipped to both hands; cannot be disarmed. Doesn't block Taijutsu stances. You can still use Hand Seals and Chakra Seals and wield a separate weapon. Uses your Unarmed Damage if the listed damage die is lower. Can cast Taijutsu and Bukijutsu; bonuses/penalties to weapon attacks also apply to your unarmed attacks.

properties.name: Versatile
properties.description: Can be wielded with one or two hands. The parenthetical damage applies when used two-handed in melee.

properties.name: Volatile
properties.description: No ability modifier added to damage. If your d20 result is ≤ the Volatile rank, the weapon backfires and deals its damage to you. If the damage die is increased in count or size, Volatile rank increases by +4.

properties.name: Winding
properties.description: In place of a weapon attack, wind up the weapon. Your next attack with this weapon has advantage.

properties.name: Special
properties.description: Has a unique ability — see the specific weapon's entry (e.g. Battle Wire's trap actions).

properties.name: Bulky
properties.description: Grants disadvantage on Stealth checks.

properties.name: Bulwark
properties.description: +2 bonus to saving throws and checks made to resist being moved against your will.

properties.name: Camouflage
properties.description: +2 bonus to Stealth checks at Night.

properties.name: Fashionable
properties.description: +2 bonus to Persuasion checks against non-hostile creatures.

properties.name: Fortified
properties.description: Treats the first critical hit against you per rest as a normal hit.

properties.name: Heavyweight
properties.description: Imposes a Strength ability score requirement to wear without penalty (the requirement is listed in parentheses with this property).

properties.name: High Quality
properties.description: Gains +1 Seal Slots for Armor Seals.

properties.name: Lightweight
properties.description: Reduces the armor's Bulk by half.

properties.name: Reinforced
properties.description: Gains Damage Reduction against Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. The DR value is listed in parentheses with this property.

properties.name: Threatening
properties.description: +2 bonus to Intimidation checks.
